name: Setuid Binary Execution
description: Detects execution of uncommon setuid binaries that may indicate exploitation
query:
// Setuid Binary Execution
// Non-standard setuid binary execution
events from endpoint
where setuid = true
  and process_name not in ("sudo", "su", "passwd", "ping", "mount", "umount")
group by hostname, username, process_name
having count(*) >= 1
within 300 seconds
